item.title: NannyML / nannyml
item.description:
Desc: Detecting silent model failure. NannyML estimates performance with an algorithm called Confidence-based Performance estimation (CBPE), developed by core contributors. It is the only open-source algorithm capable of fully capturing the impact of data drift on performance.
Lang: Python
